plan_metadata.name: Feature Message Extension With Action Command ts Playground Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu.
Click on the "Other Teams Capabilities" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" modal.
Click the "Message Extension" option in the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu.
Click on the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown at the top of the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Click the send button (paper plane icon) in the message input area of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.

Click the "Action Command" option in the "Select a type of Message Extension" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application, indicated by the red crosshair at position (561, 640).
Type text: 'createCard' into the 'Command ID' input field within the "Action-Based Message Extension" dialog of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.

Click the "Create" button in the Action-Based Message Extension dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application. The button is located at the bottom right of the popup and is highlighted with a purple background, confirming the submission of the dialog configuration.

Click the "Create" button in the dialog for Action-Based Message Extension within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application, confirming the creation of a static list of parameters for the "createCard" command.
Click inside the "Card title" input field in the "Your Message Extension App" dialog to focus and edit the text ("Title for the car") within a Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application modal.
Type text 'subTitle' into the "Card title" input field in the "Your Message Extension App" dialog on the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.
Click the "Subtitle" input field in the "Your Message Extension App" dialog within Microsoft 365 Agents Playground, specifically targeting the placeholder text "Subtitle for the card".
Type text 'subTitle' into the "Subtitle" input field within the "Your Message Extension App" popup on the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface.

Click inside the "Text" multiline input field (labeled "Text for the ca...") within the "Your Message Extension App" dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application to focus the text area.
Enter 'text' into the "Text" input field of the "Your Message Extension App" dialog in Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface.

Click the "Submit" button in the "Your Message Extension App" popup form within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application. The button is located below the "Card title," "Subtitle," and "Text" input fields.
Click the "Add" button (plus icon) in the card footer within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface, located beneath the card labeled "subTitle."
@assertion "subTitle" card exists.
Click the large card displaying the grid icon, "subTitle" label, and "text" within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface.

Click the "Action Command" button (with clipboard icon) inside the message card from Test Bot in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application. The click targets the button's label area, triggering the card's associated action.
Click the "Create" button in the modal dialog on the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application to submit the selected parameters for generating a card.
Click the "Card title" input field in the "Your Message Extension App" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.
Type the text 'cardTitle' into the 'Card title' input field of the "Your Message Extension App" modal in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.
Click into the "Subtitle" input field within the "Your Message Extension App" modal dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application to focus and prepare for text entry.
Type text 'cardTitle' into the "Card title" input field of the "Your Message Extension App" dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.

Click inside the "Text" input field of the "Your Message Extension App" dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application, specifically at the location displaying the placeholder text "Text for the" where the red crosshair is positioned.
Type 'text' into the "Text" input field within the "Your Message Extension App" popup dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface.

Click the "Submit" button in the "Your Message Extension App" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface, targeting the button below the card input fields as indicated by the red crosshair at (288, 572).
Click the red plus (+) icon located at the bottom right of the card titled "cardTitle" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.
@assertion "cardTitle" card exists.
Click the "Customize and control Google Chrome" menu button (three vertical dots) in the top-right corner of the Chrome browser within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.
Click the "Zoom +" button in the Chrome browser's menu to increase the page zoom level within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.
Click the "Zoom out" (minus) button in the Google Chrome browser's menu to set the zoom level to 90%, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.
Click the left mouse button on the "General" Teams Channel in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface, as indicated by the red crosshair on the left sidebar.
Click the "General" channel under "Teams Channel" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface, as indicated by the red crosshair on the left sidebar.
Click the "Type a message..." input field in the General Teams Channel chat area of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.
Click the "Action Command" option in the "Select a type of Message Extension" dropdown menu within the message composer area of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application.
Click the "Create" button in the Action-Based Message Extension dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application, highlighted by a red crosshair at the bottom-right of the dialog.

Click the "Card title" input field in the "Your Message Extension App" popup dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface, specifically at the text "Title for the card" to activate text entry.
Enter the text 'testTitle' into the 'Card title' input field within the "Your Message Extension App" modal on the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface.

Click the "Subtitle" input field in the "Your Message Extension App" modal dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface, positioning the cursor where the placeholder text "Subtitle for the card" is displayed.
Type text 'testTitle' into the "Card title" input field of the "Your Message Extension App" popup in Microsoft 365 Agents Playground.
Click inside the "Text" input field of the "Your Message Extension App" dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application, specifically at the point after the text "Text for tF card".
Type text: 'text' into the "Text" input field of the "Your Message Extension App" popup dialog in Microsoft 365 Agents Playground.

Click the "Submit" button in the "Your Message Extension App" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application. The button is located below the input fields for card title, subtitle, and text.
Click the blue "Post" button below the message card in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application’s General Teams Channel chat interface.
@assertion "testTitle" card exists.
